economic_notes: Operates gaming commission, tobacco store, fisheries, rental properties, wind energy partnership (Truro Millbrook Wind LP 51%), hotel partnership (We'Kopekwitk Service Hotel LP 97%), aquaculture, technology company, Hampton Inn holding, cultural centre, and various land/property holdings.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to failure to identify Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) liabilities under PS 3280 adopted April 1, 2022. Net debt position of -$12,058,157. Large new RBC mortgage borrowing of $23.4M in 2023 drove long-term debt from $35.6M to $56.0M. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: We'Kopekwitk Service Hotel LP (97%) and Truro Millbrook Wind LP (51%). 17 consolidated subsidiaries. Total government transfers estimated as ISC $19,978,353 + METS $707,464 + CMHC $465,739 + Additional government funding $2,225,144 = $23,376,700. OSR = $61,892,572 - $23,376,700 = $38,515,872. Fishing licenses of $6,676,978 included as non-financial intangible asset. 1919 Land Claim Trust holds $9,991,954 in restricted cash.
